channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Paul McCartney’s 21st Birthday Party Became the Scene of John Lennon’s Assault on Bob Wooler
item.description: On June 18, 1963, Paul McCartney celebrated his 21st birthday at the home of his Aunt Jin in Huyton, Liverpool. The gathering brought together many notable figures from the Merseybeat music scene and ...

item.title: Opinion: Author Argues Trump's Proposed Iran Agreement Is Unlikely to Hold
item.description: In this opinion column, John Casey expresses deep skepticism about President Donald Trump's claims that a new agreement with Iran is close to completion. The author argues that Trump has repeatedly an...

item.title: Tommy Tuberville Draws Criticism After Urging Americans to Trust Trump and Vance Over Congress
item.description: Sen. Tommy Tuberville (R-AL) faced significant criticism on social media and from political commentators after remarks he made during an appearance on Fox Business. Discussing President Donald Trump’s...

item.title: A Look Back at Actress Angela Greene and Her Hollywood Career in the 1940s and 1950s
item.description: Angela Greene (1921–1978) was an Irish-born American actress and model who became known for her refined appearance and graceful presence during the Golden Age of Hollywood. Born in Dublin, Ireland, sh...

item.title: Former Trump aide criticizes Iran deal and predicts denial response from Trump

item.title: Study Finds Elevated Stress Accumulation at Southern California's Cajon Pass Fault Junction
item.description: A recent study published in the Journal of Geophysical Research has identified unusually high levels of accumulated tectonic stress at Cajon Pass, a critical fault junction in Southern California wher...

item.title: Equatorial Guinea government resigns after missing performance targets
item.description: The government of Equatorial Guinea has collectively resigned following what officials described as a significant failure to meet governing objectives. Prime Minister Manuel Osa Nsue Nsua formally sub...

item.title: The 1965 Griffith Series 200 Combined a Lightweight British Chassis with a Powerful Ford V8
item.description: The article highlights the 1965 Griffith Series 200, a rare Anglo-American sports car that successfully combined British engineering principles with American high-performance power. Built by hand in S...

item.title: Socioeconomic Factors Behind Female Criminality in Early 20th-Century New York City
item.description: This article examines the realities of female criminality in New York City during the early twentieth century, challenging the sensationalized portrayals commonly found in newspapers of the era. While...

item.title: Rare Behind-the-Scenes Photos Highlight the Making and Legacy of The Panic in Needle Park
